📋 HOW TO USE IN POWERPOINT:
  1. Open this HTML file in your browser
  2. Click and drag to select the ASCII art div you want
  3. Copy (Ctrl+C) and paste (Ctrl+V) directly into PowerPoint
  4. In PowerPoint, set font to "Courier New" for perfect alignment
  5. Resize while holding Shift to maintain proportions
  6. Add your own text boxes and shapes around the art
✨ PRO TIP: For best print quality, use black & white versions. For projections, use dark text on light background. All templates follow corporate accessibility guidelines (WCAG 2.1).
